title: Why I never trust fully generated Code
summary: JavaScript Mastery presents a position against fully trusting code generated by AI systems. The video discusses reasons to maintain skepticism toward autonomous code generation and advocates for developer review.
writeup: JavaScript Mastery argues against fully trusting code produced by AI systems, laying out reasons to stay skeptical of autonomous code generation. The core takeaway is that generated code warrants developer review rather than blind acceptance.
